studies.title: Real-world usage and effectiveness of Uroletics® in patients with prostate cancer

_verification.reason: The study is specifically about Uroletics, as evidenced by the repeated mention of the product name in the title and summary, and the involvement of Rocketlane Medical Ventures GmbH, the manufacturer, as the primary sponsor.
